source.transport: Static JSON generated locally by scripts/fetch_market_data.py

errors: UUP: UUP no usable price points
XLB: XLB no usable price points
XLY: XLY no usable price points

summary.headline: Breadth narrows and defensive layers are gaining temperature.

groups.label: Nasdaq Breadth
groups.description: Inspired by the NDX breadth overlay workflow: index line + participation curve.

groups.label: HSI Breadth
groups.description: Core Hang Seng leaders participating above previous close.

groups.label: Sector Breadth
groups.description: US sector rotation breadth using the major SPDR complex.

groups.label: Macro Risk Breadth
groups.description: Cross-asset breadth that normalizes inverse dollar and rates pressure.

layers.label: Nasdaq Leaders
layers.description: High-beta leaders and mega-cap pressure map.

layers.label: Sector Rotation
layers.description: ETF rotation layer for fast risk-on / risk-off reads.

layers.label: HSI Core
layers.description: Large-cap Hong Kong and China internet heat layer.

layers.label: Macro Crosswinds
layers.description: Dollar, rates, energy and crypto move map.

items.label: US
items.description: Index breadth, sector rotation and volatility pressure for the U.S. session.
items.legend_note: Breadth counts members above the previous close while the white line tracks benchmark return.

summary.headline: US breadth is narrowing and defensives are taking the tape.

items.label: HK
items.description: Hong Kong beta, China tech proxies and FX pressure in one dense board.
items.legend_note: HK proxy series use liquid Yahoo-tracked ETFs so the local pipeline stays resilient when index feeds are patchy.

summary.headline: Hong Kong breadth is fading and large-cap pressure is spreading.

items.label: Macro
items.description: Dollar, rates, commodities, crypto and CNH cross-currents for macro risk reads.
items.legend_note: Macro breadth normalizes inverse risk assets such as DXY, yields and USD/CNH before counting participation.

summary.headline: Macro pressure is building as the dollar complex tightens conditions.
